item_name: Wipe the soldering iron tip on a damp sponge to remove oxidation completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note for wiping a soldering iron tip on a damp sponge to remove oxidation, shown as a small maintenance record sheet beside a soldering station, a slightly darkened iron tip, and a damp sponge in a holder. The note should clearly communicate completed tool maintenance, with simple tip-cleaning sketches and a restored-tip indicator that makes the subject specific to soldering upkeep, without readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future electronics bench aesthetic: soft warm task lighting, realistic paper, sponge, ceramic, and metal textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the document centered while the iron and sponge provide clean, minimal context.
